title: Neeyae Neeyae Lyrics Arima Nambi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Neeyae Neeyae
Singer(s): Shreya Ghosal
Movie:Arima Nambi
Music: Sivamani

Neeyae Neeyae kattraai neeye
moochil moochil poothaai.
Nee nee , kattraai nee
paaindhaene netraai nee.
Vettai theeye nee.

Minsaaramaai pandhaadinaai
ennodu nee, ondraaginaai
poraali neeyaaga paarthaen
yaareda yaareda adey adey
neeye da, uyir aanenda.

Netru naan yaarovaai
irulinil kidandhaen.
Nee vaaithaai en thaayaai
uryirnil mudindhaen.

Neeyaale naaney naan
marubadi pirandhaen.
Natkaatti thaalaipol
kilithida thunindhaen.

Aaraariro.. neeyaagum neram.
naanaaga nee paarkiren
uyire uyire nilaavilae
viral korthaeney, oh..
mazhai paarthaeney.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neeyae Neeyae, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the emotional connection with their beloved. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. The soothing melody, paired with Shreya Ghoshal's captivating voice, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Set against the backdrop of Arima Nambi, this song enhances the narrative of love and desire, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeyae Neeyae from Arima Nambi is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals combined with Sivamani's exquisite composition create an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into this romantic ballad that resonates with every heartbeat and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: You are the one who blooms in the mist. You, you, are the one who has come to my eyes. You are the huntress.
You have come to me like a shining star, I have seen you as a part of me, who else, who else, is you, my life.
Yesterday, I was nobody, lying in darkness. You became my mother and I ended my life.
You are me, I was born again. Like a puppet, I have fallen down.
Oh, you will also have your time. I see you as my life, in the moonlight, I am holding your hand, oh.. I have seen the rain.
